findings_resolved: Circle UI implied member consent that had not been collected.
Dispute reconciliation implied external resolution from a local action.
Concurrent Pilot mutations could overwrite one another.
Daily and Jamiya persistence changes lacked explicit versioned migration.
Pilot date validation depended on the host Date implementation.
